instagram.note: YTD metrics pulled from Jan 1; YTD reach uses an exact range override.

facebook.note: Views use organic media views; YTD paid views are retained for context.

tiktok.note: Profile metrics are available from May 8, 2026; top-content rows can still timeout.

youtube.note: Channel totals are from Supermetrics. Two July 3-6 public YouTube uploads were added as post metadata because Supermetrics LatestVideos and VideoTotals returned no rows for those confirmed uploads.
